images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, featuring flawless skin texture with visible pores and faint vellus hair, large expressive eyes, and a fit, curvy body. She is wearing a luxurious, form-fitting silky loungewear set that accentuates her slim waist and ample chest, the smooth fabric catching the soft light. She stands precariously at the edge of a dramatic cliff, framed in an upside-down composition that adds a surreal, high-fashion edge. Her expression is a bored, resting bitch face, exuding an air of luxury lifestyle and detachment. Beside her sits a vintage leather suitcase, suggesting a glamorous journey. The scene is bathed in bright, overcast soft sky light, rendered with a bleach bypass color grade for high contrast and low saturation. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
